StorageBar

Disk usage at a glance, right in your menubar.

Scroll or drag to explore →

The Problem

"About This Mac..."
again?

Stop digging through System Settings just to check your disk space. StorageBar puts a beautiful, live progress bar right where you need it — in your menubar.

  • No more opening About This Mac
  • No more guessing how full your disk is
  • Always visible, always updated
Before
System Settings → General → About
After
Right in your menubar
7 Styles

Pick your look

From minimal lines to glowing pills. Find the style that matches your setup.

SolidPreenchimento sólido dentro de um trilho de fundo
OutlineBorda visível ao redor da barra, sem fundo
TrackFundo de trilho visível com preenchimento colorido
55%
Pill + %Barra com texto de porcentagem dentro
Track OutlineCombinação de trilho de fundo + borda visível
GradientPreenchimento com gradiente verde→laranja
MinimalLinha horizontal mínima de 3px, sem fundo
Customize

Your bar,
your rules

Tweak every pixel. Colors, fonts, sizes, position — see changes instantly in Settings with a live preview.

Live Preview

Default: follows menu bar icon color (NSColor.labelColor)
